description_long: This handbag features a pentagonal, tapered body with a wide open top and a pair of angular, geometric handles that rise above the rim. The handles are integrated into the upper structure, forming a sturdy and modern silhouette. The exterior is smooth and unadorned, with a matte, dark brown finish that gives it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. The interior appears hollow, suggesting ample storage space for personal items. There are no visible fasteners, closures, or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional design. The overall construction suggests a rigid, molded material, likely plastic or a composite.
description: A dark brown, pentagonal handbag with angular integrated handles and a smooth, matte finish. The design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorations or closures.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pentagonal body and a prominent, angular handle structure centered at the top.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the open top and the two angular handles extending upward, with the body tapering downward.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the handle structure and the clean, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the open top and the angular handles, with the body’s tapering shape visible.
attribute_strap_type: Two short, rigid, angular handles integrated into the top rim; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: No visible closure mechanism; open top design.
